name_en: Top Original Batch Black/Colorful Medium! M13747 Collaboration with Takashi Murakami! Nine BB mini Makeup Pouch. Inspired by the iconic Nice makeup bag, this elegant wash bag is a stylish choice for carrying basic beauty essentials. A hidden zippered pocket on the inside of the flap stores particularly valuable personal items.
name_cn:
Top Original Batch Black/Colorful Medium! M13747 Collaboration with Takashi Murakami! Nine BB mini Makeup Pouch. Inspired by the iconic Nice makeup bag, this elegant wash bag is a stylish choice for carrying basic beauty essentials. Size: 20*14*13 cm
